title: v0.4.0 close + consolidation proof object

integration_trunk.name: [v060] consolidate PBL-gpuop (YSU+ACM2) into the Noah trunk — unified v0.6.0 operational scan
integration_trunk.merge_base_with_v040_chain: 96eb4e4 [v040-S6] wire native-init->24h GPU forecast gate body + foundation stability smoke
integration_trunk.note: trunk = the v0.6.0 12-scheme operational-scan integration; v0.4.0 dycore fixes + native-init were a separate lineage off the same 96eb4e4 base. This is the v040<->v060 consolidation the roadmap flagged.

consolidated_dycore_fixes.conflict_resolution: operational_mode.py: kept ONLY the new _acoustic_lateral_bc_flags helper; discarded the v0.4.0-base-only _runtime_base_state/_base_theta_for_state/_t0_for_state helpers (trunk v0.6.0 builds BaseState inline, those helpers are unused on trunk). proofs/v040/run_forecast_gate_24h.py restored from a1def01 (deleted on v0.6.0 line).

consolidated_dycore_fixes.role: PGF al(alb/muts)+dpn(cfn/cfn1) — calc_p_rho_phi + top_lid dpn faces
MYNN s_aw stability floor on kmdz before U/V implicit solve (module_bl_mynnedmf.F:3990-3997)
consolidated_dycore_fixes.conflict_resolution: git auto-merge against the v0.6.0-diverged physics files; verified _apply_s_aw_stability_floor + s_aw_floor threading present; MYNN oracle + tier1 tests PASS on CPU

consolidated_dycore_fixes.role: split-explicit php-freeze: stage-constant php in advance_uv 4th PGF term (calc_php in rk_step_prep is INTENT(IN))
consolidated_dycore_fixes.conflict_resolution: git auto-merge; php_stage defaults to None -> inactive unless small_step_prep supplies it

kf_cu_physics_1_capability.decision: ADOPT TRUNK v0.6.0 KF (cu_physics=1) — do NOT re-apply the older v0.4.0 KF-wire (828ff90/075131e)
kf_cu_physics_1_capability.reason: trunk 350a7c6 ALREADY wires Kain-Fritsch-eta into the operational scan via CU_SCAN_ADAPTERS={1: kf_adapter} (scan_adapters.py:547), with initial_kf_carry/kf_adapter/step_kf_column (cumulus_kf.py) and full NCA bookkeeping. This v0.6.0 integration is more complete and more recent than the parallel v0.4.0 KF-wire built for the bias-falsification gate; re-applying the older wiring would conflict with and regress the unified 12-scheme scan.

kf_oracle_gate.oracle: single-column Fortran driver linked against unmodified WRF /home/enric/src/wrf_pristine/WRF/phys/module_cu_kfeta.F

kf_cu_physics_1_capability.cu_off_replay_safe: cu_physics=0 leaves cumulus_carry=None and the scan cumulus slot is skipped (operational_mode.py: `if cu_opt in CU_SCAN_ADAPTERS`); structurally identical to the pre-v0.6.0 carry.

kf_is_not_the_bias_fix.claim: Kain-Fritsch cumulus does NOT fix the standalone near-surface westerly bias

jax_kf_2date_gate.interpretation: KF on/off moves near-surface winds by <0.001 m/s; the +0.54/+0.65 m/s biases persist unchanged

independent_cpu_wrf_oracle.result: unmodified CPU-WRF cu_physics=0 vs 1, 24h: U10 delta +0.012 m/s mean, frac-west 0.483 (symmetric, NO domain-uniform westerly), PSFC +1.39 Pa (wrong sign); RAINC=0 everywhere (KF never fires in the trade-wind subsidence regime)

kf_is_not_the_bias_fix.mechanism: KF-eta (KF_ETA_CPS, module_cumulus_driver.F:1017-1049) has NO RUCUTEN/RVCUTEN momentum tendency, so the convective-momentum-transport mechanism does not exist for this scheme

init_equivalence_reference.oracle: real.exe wrfinput_d0{1,2,3} + wrfbdy_d01 vs native driver.build_real_init (S1 dynamics + S2 surface/soil + S3 LBC)
init_equivalence_reference.only_residual: single static start_em cell ISLTYP/IVGTYP at (j=22,i=86) — documented categorical LSM-init artifact; manager decision: TRACK, do not weaken the exact-categorical gate
init_equivalence_reference.statement: native standalone init is PROVEN equivalent to real.exe at t=0

idealized_periodic_path.result: BIT-IDENTICAL (max_abs=0.0) on mu, mudf, muts, muave, ww, theta vs the pre-fix diagnosis branch
idealized_periodic_path.note: warm_bubble/density_current verdicts in the same report are cached GPU diagnostics (GPU not available to this CPU-only consolidation worker); the BC-conditional fixes default to periodic_x=True/specified=False/nested=False and php_stage=None so the idealized/periodic path is unchanged by construction and proven bit-identical

replay_path_impact.note: BC-flag routing verified: idealized->(T,F,F); d02 replay specified->(F,T,F); d03 nested->(F,F,T). The v0.1.0/v0.2.0 replay path is unchanged.

no_regression.compile_check: all touched src modules py_compile OK; gpuwrf imports clean

gpu_gated_tests_not_run.reason: State.zeros mandates a GPU device (contracts/state.py:_gpu_device); fail identically on UNMODIFIED trunk in a CPU-only sandbox. NOT a consolidation regression. Resource policy restricted this worker to cores 0-3, no GPU.

forecast_skill_limitation.status: DOCUMENTED, NOT FIXED — tracked as a cross-version forecast-skill item
forecast_skill_limitation.the_bias: domain-uniform near-surface WESTERLY excess in the 24h STANDALONE forecast: +1.2 m/s (20260429) / +0.75 m/s (20260521). T2 correct, column-wide, stable/finite.

ruled_out_table.ruled_out: FALSIFIED — JAX cu0-vs-cu1 <0.001 m/s AND independent unmodified CPU-WRF cu0-vs-cu1 +0.012 m/s symmetric; RAINC=0; KF-eta has no momentum tendency
PROVEN EQUIVALENT — s5_native_init_parity_report.json PASS (only 1-cell categorical LSM residual); init is NOT the source
MYNN s_aw floor adjudicated WRF-faithful (savepoint PASS); not the bias source
REAL WRF omission found+fixed (kmdz floor with bl_mynn_edmf_mom=0), savepoint PASS, but does not collapse the bias
php STAGE-CONSTANT fix is WRF-faithful (calc_php INTENT(IN)), savepoint PASS, does not collapse the bias
BC-conditional mass-continuity fix is WRF-faithful (collapses PSFC-/U10+ DRIFT, savepoint PASS) but a residual uniform westerly excess remains
WRF-faithful fix (calc_p_rho_phi + top_lid dpn faces), savepoint PASS; adjudication: bias NOT in large-step PGF/al terms
JAX KF-wire gate AND unmodified-CPU-WRF cu_physics=0-vs-1 both <0.01 m/s; KF never fires in this regime

forecast_skill_limitation.conclusion: the bias is DYNAMICAL, not traceable to any faithful ported operator or scheme vs unmodified WRF; possibly sample/config-specific but untestable without new met_em-preserving CPU-WRF runs
forecast_skill_limitation.expand_dates_status: DATA_BLOCKED — only 2 native-runnable dates; the rest have purged met_em

close_criterion.criterion: native-init equivalence (t=0) + 24h stability + an HONESTLY DOCUMENTED forecast-skill limitation (standalone 24h near-surface westerly bias on the 2-date sample, NOT a fidelity bug)
close_criterion.claim: standalone native init equivalence + stable forecast, with a documented near-surface wind-bias limitation under investigation

unresolved_risk: the standalone 24h near-surface westerly bias (+0.75..+1.2 m/s, 2-date MAM sample) is unexplained after 10 debug rounds; ruled out vs all faithful ported operators/schemes but NOT root-caused. Expand-dates falsification is DATA_BLOCKED (purged met_em). Tracked for re-test once met_em-preserving CPU-WRF runs are available (0.9.0 backfill gate).
